name: Trench Ghosts
description: Undead Heretic troopers trapped between planes. Semi-corporeal, slow, terrifying. Hate all life.
add_rules: Barbed Wire Banshee: Can include a Barbed Wire Banshee (same profile/cost as Chorister) INSTEAD of a Chorister. Replaces Unholy Hymns with Wire Shriek: +1 INJURY DICE to enemy Injury Rolls within 8".
Enemies of All: Cannot include Mercenaries.

Lost Souls: Cannot include ARTIFICIAL models (War Wolf, Artillery Witch banned). Anointed Heavy Infantry allowed but without Infernal Brand — still costs 95D. No Hellbound Soul Contracts or Infernal Brands.
Semi-corporeal: -1 INJURY DICE for Ranged Attack Injury Rolls on all warband models.
Slow and Creeping: Treat Movement as 3"/Infantry when taking Dash ACTION. -1 DICE on attacks vs retreating enemies.
Undead Horror: All models gain FEAR, NEGATE DIFFICULT TERRAIN, NEGATE GAS keywords.

abilities: Barbed Wail: +1 INJURY DICE to Injury Rolls for enemy models within 8".
Barbed Wire Banshee: Same profile as Chorister but replaces Unholy Hymns.
Wire Shriek: Add +1 INJURY DICE to Injury Rolls for enemy models within 8" of one or more Barbed Wire Banshees.
